bosses.name: Data Corruption
bosses.felix_quote: It's eating through our data layers. Fire with fire — you'll need a dragon that can take the heat.

bosses.name: Memory Leak
bosses.felix_quote: This thing absorbs and never releases. It'll freeze you solid if you let it accumulate.

bosses.name: Stack Overflow
bosses.felix_quote: Infinite recursion manifested as pure electricity. It's fast. Faster than anything we've faced.

final_boss.name: The Singularity
final_boss.felix_quote: This is it. The source of everything. It will adapt. It will learn. Do not let it win.
